what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG outline icon showing a house roof, walls, and doorway using currentColor stroke styling.
observations: Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Three path elements draw the roof line, house body, and door.
standouts: The icon is compact enough to be embedded inline or used as an asset.
conventions: Follows common outline-icon SVG conventions: no fill, rounded strokes, 24x24 viewBox.
Uses presentation attributes directly on the root svg.
Keeps the SVG as a single-line asset with no metadata or title element.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are included, so accessible labeling depends on the consumer.
notes: A small currentColor house-roof outline icon asset.
questions: Should this icon be decorative or exposed with an accessible label when used?
purpose_vs_actual: Filename implies a house-roof icon; the SVG content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable home/house icon that adapts to surrounding text or UI color.
contribution: Contributes a compact home-shaped SVG pictogram with inherited stroke color and simple path geometry for use in a fused visual system.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG outline icon depicting a house roof, body, and doorway with rounded strokes.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for representing a home or house-roof concept as a reusable design-system icon asset.
